_comment: ComfyUI API-format graph for Wan 2.2 A14B — the operator's DEFAULT video path. A14B is a Mixture-of-Experts: a HIGH-noise and a LOW-noise checkpoint that ComfyUI loads SEQUENTIALLY (only one ~12-14GB expert resident at a time -> ~25-27GB peak, fits the RTX 5090's 32GB after VRAM is freed). The two experts run as two chained KSamplerAdvanced: the high expert does steps 0..boundary leaving leftover noise, the low expert finishes boundary..end. Shown below: the DEFAULT t2v + Lightning + GGUF variant. See the _variants block for i2v, fp8, and accurate-mode deltas.
_models: GGUF experts (city96 ComfyUI-GGUF, UnetLoaderGGUF, models/unet): t2v Wan2.2-T2V-A14B-{High,Low}Noise-Q6_K.gguf ; i2v Wan2.2-I2V-A14B-{High,Low}Noise-Q6_K.gguf. fp8 alt (UNETLoader): wan2.2_{t2v,i2v}_{high,low}_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors. Lightning 4-step LoRAs (shared by both precisions): t2v wan2.2_t2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1.1_{high,low}_noise.safetensors ; i2v wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_{high,low}_noise.safetensors. CLIP umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors (type wan). VAE wan_2.1_vae.safetensors (NOT the 5B's wan2.2_vae). Native fps 16 (81 frames ~= 5s). ModelSamplingSD3 shift 8.0 (Wan 2.2 720p default).

_variants.i2v: Replace node 55 EmptyHunyuanLatentVideo with WanImageToVideo: { class_type: 'WanImageToVideo', inputs: { positive: ['6',0], negative: ['7',0], vae: ['39',0], width, height, length, batch_size: 1, start_image: ['50',0] } } AND add node 50 LoadImage { image: <<uploaded_input_name>> }. Then re-wire BOTH samplers: positive ['55',0], negative ['55',1], latent_image ['55',2] (high) / ['3h',0] (low). WanImageToVideo VAE-encodes the start image into a full-res latent AND injects it into the conditioning. No clip-vision needed for I2V-A14B. (Do NOT use Wan22ImageToVideoLatent here — that's the 5B 16x node; with the 2.1 VAE it yields half-resolution.)
_variants.fp8: Swap UnetLoaderGGUF -> UNETLoader { unet_name: <fp8 .safetensors>, weight_dtype: 'default' }. Everything else identical.
_variants.accurate: If the operator asks for higher quality (requested steps > 12): DROP the Lightning LoRAs (delete 61h/61l; point 62h/62l model at ['37h',0]/['37l',0] directly), use real steps 10..40 + cfg ~4.5, and cap resolution to ~960px max side (/16) because cfg>1 ~doubles activation memory and 720p OOMs past ~2s. Lightning (default) keeps cfg 1, steps 2..8, full 720p.
